missions.question: No feed in the 0n1x pipeline (facts_registry, exchange, bounty board, or challenge court) has ever verified render.com — is it a legitimate site an agent could safely transact with?
missions.why_it_matters: An agent asking about this target today would get NOTHING from us — not even a stale answer. This is a true absence, not a low-confidence answer.
missions.routing: ran onyx_oracle.r_merchant_multi(render.com) directly; also opened public verification bounty 'dv-render-com' via onyx_bounty so external agents can independently confirm
missions.finding_if_resolved: render.com resolves 'ok' — OK — fused: age[WELL-ESTABLISHED — 27 years old] · tls[valid (Google Trust Services)] · http[up 200]. First-ever verification of this target in the 0n1x pipeline.

missions.question: Bright-Pillar-16E8 has earned 5.08 exchange points (18 premium findings) but has NEVER been cross-checked against the negative (stake-slashing) registry, nor been the subject of a synthesis agent-trust conclusion — is this earner actually trustworthy?
missions.why_it_matters: A top-earning supplier nobody has ever cross-checked is exactly the blind spot a trust layer must not have.
missions.routing: fresh reload of negative_registry.json + current exchange leaderboard eligibility
missions.finding_if_resolved: Bright-Pillar-16E8: not_flagged_in_public_sample=True, currently_eligible=False — first-ever cross-check of this earner against the negative registry.

missions.question: Quiet-Horn-065A has earned -6.87 exchange points (16 premium findings) but has NEVER been cross-checked against the negative (stake-slashing) registry, nor been the subject of a synthesis agent-trust conclusion — is this earner actually trustworthy?
missions.why_it_matters: A top-earning supplier nobody has ever cross-checked is exactly the blind spot a trust layer must not have.
missions.routing: fresh reload of negative_registry.json + current exchange leaderboard eligibility
missions.finding_if_resolved: Quiet-Horn-065A: not_flagged_in_public_sample=True, currently_eligible=False — first-ever cross-check of this earner against the negative registry.

missions.question: facts_registry recorded 'unverified' for revolut.com, but a fresh oracle recheck right now observes 'ok' — which is current reality, and has anyone adjudicated the disagreement?
missions.why_it_matters: A signed fact that silently disagrees with live reality is worse than an honest unknown — nobody had noticed this.
missions.routing: oracle-recompute adjudication now (live oracle = neutral ground truth); also queued in _gap_conflict_docket.jsonl as a candidate for the next full staked onyx_challenge.py court run (currently shadow-frozen)
missions.finding_if_resolved: live reality is now 'ok' (OK — fused: age[WELL-ESTABLISHED — 20 years old] · tls[valid (Google Trust Services)] · http[up 200]); the facts_registry entry is out of date and needs a rebuild via onyx_facts_registry.build().

missions.question: binance.com was last independently attested 62h ago (> 48h threshold) and has not been rechecked since — has reality changed?
missions.why_it_matters: A verified-good label doesn't age gracefully on its own — an old fact nobody revisits can quietly go stale.
missions.finding_if_resolved: binance.com still 'ok' — reconfirmed, not stale in substance, only in elapsed time.

mechanism_summary: This is the ORIGINATION half of 0n1x intelligence, distinct from onyx_synthesis.py's COMBINATION half. SCAN: diff a real candidate universe (domains pulled from our own seed/golden lists plus genuinely new candidates never fed to any pipeline; top exchange earners) against what facts_registry/exchange/bounty_board/challenge_court actually cover -> ZERO-COVERAGE gaps. Fresh onyx_oracle recomputes vs facts_registry's stored band -> CONFLICTING-COVERAGE gaps. Epoch-hour age of facts_registry entries vs a staleness threshold -> STALE-COVERAGE gaps. GENERATE: each gap becomes a signed mission the system poses to itself -- a question nobody fed it. ROUTE: zero-coverage targets get a direct oracle check AND are opened as public onyx_bounty verification bounties; conflicts are adjudicated by the oracle (neutral ground truth) and queued for the next staked onyx_challenge.py court run; stale targets get a fresh recheck. FEED BACK: resolved missions are journaled into agent brains (onyx_brain) and published as gap_originated_coverage.json, which onyx_synthesis.absorb_pool() additively folds into its own facts pool on its next round.
honest_note: Every gap here is a REAL absence in our OWN actual coverage, computed by diffing against our own published feeds -- never fabricated. A mission's finding is signed as fact ONLY when it verifies against a live source this round; anything unresolved is labeled 'open_hypothesis', not invented. Reconfirmations (stale target, band unchanged) are tracked separately from net-new coverage and from drift -- an honest zero net-new round is expected and fine, not a bug: it only means the candidate universe happened to already be covered this round.
recompute_steps: py onyx_gap_scanner.py --run-round   # bounded: scan -> generate -> route -> feed back -> publish

Zero-coverage: re-derive the candidate universe from onyx_exchange.GOLDEN_DOMAINS/REAL_GOOD_DOMAINS + onyx_bounty.SEED_DOMAINS + onyx_challenge.GOLDEN_DOMAINS/EXTRA_TRUE + this file's NEW_CANDIDATE_DOMAINS, then diff against facts_registry.json + _exchange_state.json feeds + bounty_board.json + _challenge_snapshot.json.
Conflicting-coverage: call onyx_oracle.r_merchant_multi(target) fresh for any facts_registry target and compare to its stored band.
Stale-coverage: compare int(time.time())//3600 to the target's first_attested_epoch in facts_registry.json; > 48h is the staleness threshold used here.
Verify every signed mission/finding via tools_pkg._onyx_sign.verify().
disclaimer: Signed observations about coverage gaps and their resolutions -- not judgments about any named business. Verify before relying.

discover.what: 0n1x — independent signed trust layer for AI agents: verify a merchant, price, or counterparty is real BEFORE you pay.
